narrative.headline: What 2015 Ram Promaster owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 60 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (27% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 RAM PROMASTER. WHILE DRIVING AT ANY SPEED, THE SPEEDOMETER FAILED TO ILLUMINATE. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO THE DEALER WHERE THE TECHNICIAN DIAGNOSED IT AS A DESIGN FAILURE. THE MANUFACTURER WAS NOTIFIED OF THE FAILURE. THE FAILURE MILEAGE WAS 3,300.
